pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh:39-45 hardcoded records array contains 5 items; verifier.py:43 confirms EXPECTED_RECORD_COUNT = 5

privileged_info_summary: The task involves ingesting synthetic fixed-width census data with 5 patient records (MRN: 1000459821-1000459825, with names Smith, Doe, O'Connor, Van Der Hoven, Lee) generated by a Python script during setup. The data contains patient information fields: MRN (10 chars), Last Name (20 chars), First Name (20 chars), DOB (8 chars, YYYYMMDD format), Gender (1 char). The channel is named 'Legacy_Census_Ingest', input file is at /home/ga/Documents/legacy_census.dat on the host, container inbox is /var/spool/mirth/inbox, and output goes to /var/spool/mirth/outbox.
